description: This 3D model depicts a bed with a simple yet elegant wooden frame, featuring a gently arched headboard and a matching footboard. The bed is adorned with bedding that includes a crisp white sheet or pillow area at the head and a dark blue blanket or duvet covering the rest of the mattress. Positioned to the right of the bed is a tall, slender bedside lamp with a minimalist design, featuring a white cylindrical shade and a matching base. The wooden elements of the bed frame display a natural grain texture, adding warmth to the overall presentation. The setup is clean, functional, and presented against a plain light grey background, highlighting the bed and its accessory.
